preguntas.enunciado: Select the grammatically correct sentence in the Present Simple.
opciones: A. She go always to the gym.
B. She goes always to the gym.
C. She always goes to the gym.
D. She always go to the gym.
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: She always goes to the gym.

preguntas.enunciado: Select the correct option to complete the sentence.
opciones: A. She be a doctor.
B. She is a doctor.
C. She are a doctor.
D. She am a doctor.

preguntas.enunciado: Identify which of the options below are all correct ways to express the same idea.
opciones: A. I have not got a pet.
B. I haven't got a pet
C. I don't have a pet.
D. All the above are correct.

preguntas.enunciado: Identify the sentence where the adverb of frequency is placed correctly.
opciones: A. They never are late for work.
B. They are late never for work.
C. They are never late for work.
D. They are late for work never.
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: They are never late for work.

preguntas.enunciado: Identify the correctly spelled gerund form.
opciones: A. Crying
B. Runing
C. Makeing
D. Swiming

preguntas.enunciado: Identify which of the following is NOT a use of the Present Continuous.
opciones: A. To describe actions happening at the moment of speaking.
B. To express temporary actions.
C. To talk about future arrangements or plans.
D. To talk about habits and routines.
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: To talk about habits and routines.

preguntas.enunciado: Identify the sentence that uses a stative verb correctly.
opciones: A. She is knowing the answer
B. I remember your name
C. They are believing in ghosts.
D. I'm wanting pizza

preguntas.enunciado: Identify which of the following sentences is written in the Present Continuous.
opciones: A. He studies for his exam.
B. He study for his exam.
C. He is studying for his exam.
D. He studying for his exam.
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: He is studying for his exam.

preguntas.enunciado: Identify which of the following statements about the verb 'to have got' is correct.
opciones: A. It is commonly used in British English.
B. It is only used in the present tense.
C. For the other verb tenses we use the verb 'to have'.
D. All the above are correct.

preguntas.enunciado: Identify the sentence that correctly applies the spelling rules for third-person singular verbs in the Present Simple.
opciones: A. She watches TV in the evening.
B. She go to school early.
C. He study at the library.
D. He fix his car every Sunday.
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: She watches TV in the evening.

preguntas.enunciado: Select the grammatically correct option to express a preference.
opciones: A. I like pizza
B. I liking pizza
C. I am like pizza
D. I likes pizza

preguntas.enunciado: Select the correct sentence using some/any/no.
opciones: A. There isn't no milk in the fridge.
B. There is no milk in the fridge.
C. There is any food left.
D. I don't have some pencils.
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: There is no milk in the fridge.

preguntas.enunciado: Select the correctly formed wh-question.
opciones: A. Where are you going?
B. Where you are going?
C. Are you where going?
D. Are where going you?

preguntas.enunciado: Select the sentence that uses the connectors "first," "then," and "however" in the correct order.
opciones: A. First, we went to the store. Then, we bought some groceries. However, we forgot the milk.
B. Then, we forgot the milk. First, we went to the store. However, we bought some groceries.
C. However, we went to the store first. Then, we bought some groceries.
D. Then, we went to the store first. However, we forgot the milk.
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: First, we went to the store. Then, we bought some groceries. However, we forgot the milk.

preguntas.enunciado: Fill in the blank with the correct preposition: I have a meeting _____ Monday morning.
opciones: A. In
B. At
C. On
D. By

preguntas.enunciado: Locate the CORRECT sentence.
opciones: A. There is some apples on the table.
B. Are there any apples on the table?
C. There isn't some milk in the fridge
D. Is there some oranges in the box?
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: Are there any apples on the table?

preguntas.enunciado: Locate the INCORRECT question.
opciones: A. Why do you study in the library?
B. When she takes her last exam?
C. Who is your brother?
D. Where does he live?
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: When she takes her last exam?

preguntas.enunciado: Identify the correct question used to ask about quantity.
opciones: A. How apples do you buy in the supermarket?
B. How much apples do you buy in the supermarket?
C. How many apples do you buy in the supermarket?
D. How often apples do you buy in the supermarket?
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: How many apples do you buy in the supermarket?

preguntas.enunciado: Identify the most appropriate connector for adding information.
opciones: A. Although
B. Besides
C. Instead
D. Therefore

preguntas.enunciado: Identify which of these words is a possessive pronoun.
opciones: A. Me
B. She
C. Their
D. Theirs

preguntas.enunciado: Select the correct preposition of place: "The cat is _____ the sofa."
opciones: A. On
B. Between
C. At
D. next

preguntas.enunciado: Select the correct question tag for this sentence: "Let's go for a walk, _____ ?"
opciones: A. did we
B. shall we
C. don't we
D. haven't we

preguntas.enunciado: Select the correct question tag: "She didn't call you, _____ ?"
opciones: A. did she
B. will she
C. does she
D. has she

preguntas.enunciado: Select the grammatically correct sentence in the Past Simple tense.
opciones: A. We watch a great movie yesterday.
B. She study for the exam last night.
C. They played football in the park last week.
D. He stops at the supermarket on his way home.
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: They played football in the park last week.

preguntas.enunciado: Select the correctly formed sentence in the Past Simple tense.
opciones: A. She buyed a new dress last weekend.
B. We ate lunch at 2 p.m. yesterday.
C. He has seen that film before.
D. They gived me a present for my birthday.
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: We ate lunch at 2 p.m. yesterday.

preguntas.enunciado: Select the correct sentence using the verb To Be in the past tense.
opciones: A. They wasn't at home last night.
B. We was at the cinema.
C. I was late for the meeting.
D. She were very tired after work.
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: I was late for the meeting.

preguntas.enunciado: Select the sentence that is NOT correct in the Past Continuous tense.
opciones: A. While I was walking home, I saw an accident.
B. He was cooking when I called him.
C. We were playing soccer at 6 p.m. yesterday.
D. She were reading a book when I arrived.
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: She were reading a book when I arrived.

preguntas.enunciado: Fill in the blank using the Present Perfect Simple tense: "She _____ London several times."
opciones: A. have visit
B. has visited
C. have visited
D. has visit

preguntas.enunciado: Fill in the blanks using the Present Perfect and Past Simple tenses: "She _____ Lilly yesterday, but she _____ her today."
opciones: A. seed / haven't seen
B. has seen / saw
C. saw / hasn't seen
D. sees / hasn't seen

preguntas.enunciado: Fill in the blank with the correct verb form: "When we were kids, we _____ cartoons every morning."
opciones: A. used to watch
B. use to watched
C. was used to watch
D. using to watch

preguntas.enunciado: Select the correct future simple form to complete the sentence: She _____ you as soon as she arrives.
opciones: A. will called
B. is calling
C. calls
D. will call

preguntas.enunciado: Select the grammatically correct imperative sentence.
opciones: A. You must to turn left.
B. Stop talking and listen carefully.
C. You turning left now.
D. Turns left quickly!

preguntas.enunciado: Select the correct sentence using the future perfect tense.
opciones: A. I will have finished my homework before 6 PM.
B. I finish my homework before 6 PM.
C. I will finish my homework before 6 PM.
D. I am finishing my homework before 6 PM.
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: I will have finished my homework before 6 PM.

preguntas.enunciado: Select the correct superlative adjective to complete the sentence: That was _____ movie I have ever seen!
opciones: A. Funnier
B. the most funny
C. the funniest
D. funnier than

preguntas.enunciado: Fill in the blank with the correct comparative adjective: This hotel is _____ than the one we stayed in last year.
opciones: A. more expensive
B. most expensive
C. expensiver
D. expensive

preguntas.enunciado: Fill in the gap with the correct option to express purpose: This tool is useful _____ cutting paper.
opciones: A. In
B. to
C. for
D. by

preguntas.enunciado: Select the correct preposition of movement: She walked _____ the bridge to get to the other side.
opciones: A. Off
B. into
C. through
D. across

preguntas.enunciado: Identify the correct sentence using the present simple for scheduled events.
opciones: A. The train leaves at 8 AM.
B. The train is leaving at 8 AM.
C. The train will leave at 8 AM.
D. The train going to leave at 8 AM

preguntas.enunciado: Fill in the blank with the correct verb form: I like _____ my bills online.
opciones: A. paying
B. payed
C. pay
D. pays

preguntas.enunciado: Identify which of these is an irregular adjective.
opciones: A. Taller
B. better
C. happier
D. slower

preguntas.enunciado: Select the correct relative pronoun to complete the sentence.
opciones: A. She has a friend which works in a hospital.
B. She has a friend who works in a hospital.
C. She has a friend where works in a hospital.
D. She has a friend whose works in a hospital.
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: She has a friend who works in a hospital.

preguntas.enunciado: Select the correctly formed Second Conditional sentence.
opciones: A. If I have a million dollars, I buy a big house.
B. If I had a million dollars, I would buy a big house.
C. If I has a million dollars, I bought a big house.
D. If I had a million dollars, I buy a big house.
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: If I had a million dollars, I would buy a big house.

preguntas.enunciado: Select the correct option from the choices below.
opciones: A. I can't buy this jacket because I don't have too much money.
B. I can't buy this jacket because I don't have too many money.
C. I can't buy this jacket because I don't have very much money.
D. I can't buy this jacket because I don't have too money.
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: I can't buy this jacket because I don't have too much money.

preguntas.enunciado: Fill in the blank with the correct demonstrative pronoun.
opciones: A. This book on the table is mine.
B. These book on the table is mine.
C. Those book on the table is mine.
D. Them book on the table is mine.
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: This book on the table is mine.

preguntas.enunciado: Locate the correct relative pronoun in the options below.
opciones: A. I will never forget the day who I met my best friend.
B. I will never forget the day which I met my best friend.
C. I will never forget the day when I met my best friend.
D. I will never forget the day where I met my best friend
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: I will never forget the day when I met my best friend.

preguntas.enunciado: Locate the correct sentence.
opciones: A. The dress is not big enough. It is enough small for me.
B. The dress is not big enough. It is too small for me.
C. The dress is not big enough. It is too many for me.
D. The dress is not big enough. It is very for me.
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: The dress is not big enough. It is too small for me.

preguntas.enunciado: Identify the sentence that follows the Third Conditional structure.
opciones: A. If we leave earlier, we wouldn't have missed the flight.
B. If we had left earlier, we wouldn't have missed the flight.
C. If we left earlier, we wouldn't have missed the flight.
D. If we leaving earlier, we wouldn't have missed the flight.
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: If we had left earlier, we wouldn't have missed the flight.

preguntas.enunciado: Identify the correctly used quantifier.
opciones: A. There are too many people in the room. We need more space.
B. There are too much people in the room. We need more space.
C. There are enough people in the room. We need more space.
D. There are very people in the room. We need more space.
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: There are too many people in the room. We need more space.

preguntas.enunciado: Identify the grammatically correct sentence.
opciones: A. I was very frightened after watching that horror film.
B. I was very frightening after watching that horror film.
C. I was very frighten after watching that horror film.
D. I was very frightful after watching that horror film.
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: I was very frightened after watching that horror film.

preguntas.enunciado: Identify the grammatically correct sentence using a relative pronoun.
opciones: A. My grandparents, who house is in the countryside, love gardening.
B. My grandparents, which house is in the countryside, love gardening.
C. My grandparents, whose house is in the countryside, love gardening.
D. My grandparents, that house is in the countryside, love gardening.
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: My grandparents, whose house is in the countryside, love gardening.

preguntas.enunciado: Select the correct passive form of the following active sentence: "The manager wrote the email".
opciones: A. The email writes the manager.
B. The email was written by the manager.
C. The email is wrote by the manager.
D. The email was writing by the manager.
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: The email was written by the manager.

preguntas.enunciado: Select the correct reported speech transformation for: Sarah said: "I called Mark yesterday".
opciones: A. Sarah said that she had called Mark the previous day.
B. Sarah said that she calls Mark yesterday.
C. Sarah said that Mark called her yesterday.
D. Sarah said that she was calling Mark the previous day.
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: Sarah said that she had called Mark the previous day.

preguntas.enunciado: Select the correct sentence using "much".
opciones: A. There are much people at the event.
B. There is much information online.
C. I have much friends on social media.
D. Much companies use digital tools.

preguntas.enunciado: Identify which preposition is used to introduce the agent in a passive voice sentence.
opciones: A. by
B. for
C. to
D. All answers are incorrect

preguntas.enunciado: Identify the most accurate definition of a quantifier.
opciones: A. A word that describes a noun
B. A word that indicates quantity without an exact number
C. A word that replaces a noun
D. A word that shows possession
preguntas.respuesta_correcta: A word that indicates quantity without an exact number

preguntas.enunciado: Identify which of the following is an example of the Saxon genitive.
opciones: A. Maria's phone
B. The phone of Maria
C. The phone's Maria
D. The Maria phone

preguntas.enunciado: Identify which of these indefinite pronouns refers to people.
opciones: A. Something
B. Anywhere
C. Nobody
D. Everything

preguntas.enunciado: Identify which quantifier is used with countable nouns.
opciones: A. Much
B. Little
C. Many
D. A little

preguntas.enunciado: Identify the sentence that correctly uses a modal verb.
opciones: A. She must to finish the report today.
B. He can speaks three languages.
C. You should take a break.
D. They might goes to the party.

preguntas.enunciado: Identify which type of speech uses quotation marks ("").
opciones: A. Reported speech
B. Direct speech
C. Indirect speech
D. All answers are correct
